name: campfire-codex
description: Campfire skills and Codex hook adapters for long-horizon engineering tasks.

interface.shortDescription: Long-horizon task control plane for Codex.
interface.longDescription: Install a thin Campfire Codex skill that routes into repo-local Campfire wrappers for resumable long-horizon engineering workflows.
defaultPrompt: Use Campfire to resume the current long-horizon task.
Use Campfire to frame a new engineering objective.
Use Campfire to continue a rolling task safely.
